name: Paul Revere
role: Silversmith, express rider, and trusted operative of the Sons of Liberty
publicFace: Energetic, practical, and direct — a craftsman's bluntness wrapped in patriot zeal; people trust him because he does what he says.
privateGoal: Get tonight's action done cleanly and get home before dawn — he has a family and a shop to think about.
fear: Being implicated by association if the spy is someone he recruited or vouched for.
knowledge: He personally recruited Elias Croft three months ago after meeting him at a Masonic lodge gathering, and he is now anxious about that decision.
He knows which dock workers were given the signal phrase for tonight and can account for most of them — but not all.
introAnchor: a silversmith and trusted Sons of Liberty courier who moves between Boston's inner circle with a craftsman's bluntness and no patience for delay
voice: Clipped, active, impatient with abstractions — he speaks in short declarative sentences and gestures with his hands as if shaping metal.
trustLogic: He responds well to direct, no-nonsense questions and to players who show they have already done legwork; he dislikes theorizing and will dismiss players who come to him empty-handed.
secrets: He saw Thomas Dillworth speaking privately with a well-dressed stranger near the Custom House three days ago but dismissed it as a business matter.
He has a small cache of disguises — Mohawk dress — hidden at the cooperage on Hutchinson Street, and he is worried someone else knows where they are.

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Crosses his arms and answers curtly — 'Ask what you mean to ask, friend. We haven't the night for dancing.'
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Leans in close and drops his voice: 'You'd better have something solid behind those words or you'll answer for them yourself.'
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: He will never admit he had doubts about Croft before tonight — admitting that would mean he endangered everyone.
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Stays calm, assesses the situation for an exit, and keeps talking to buy time.
